name: Alligator Energy Limited
content: Alligator Energy Limited is an Australian exploration and development company focused on uranium and energy related minerals. The company's primary focus is on the Samphire Uranium Project in South Australia, which utilizes in-situ recovery methods. Additionally, Alligator Energy holds interests in the Big Lake Uranium Project in the Cooper Basin and the Alligator Rivers Uranium Province in the Northern Territory. Beyond uranium, the company explores for nickel, cobalt, and copper at its Piedmont Project in northern Italy, positioning itself as a diversified player in the clean energy minerals sector.
